if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemChgHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM odh_claim_item_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id WHERE h.claim_item_chg_hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemChgHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM odh_claim_item_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemChgHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM odh_claim_item_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemChgHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM odh_claim_item_chg_hist h
